channel.title: Home on Y-Matter Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Y-Matter Lab

item.title: 2025 IOP Outstanding Reviewer Award
item.description: Our PI has been awarded the 2025 IOP Outstanding Reviewer Award twice this year for his contribution to journals published by IOP Publishing. In addition, first-year doctoral student Jincheng Yue also received this award in recognition of his sustained contributions as a reviewer for JPCM, which began with his first co-review of a manuscript with the PI.

item.title: 2025 Outstanding Reviewer Award of Journal of Materials Informatics
item.description: Our PI has been selected as one of ten recipients of the 2025 Outstanding Reviewer Award from the Journal of Materials Informatics.
